description: 💖January Availability💖 We are accepting new clients for pet sitting this month and are so excited to meet your furbabies! 🥰 We are experienced with special needs, senior, and anxious pets and will provide medication administration at no extra charge. Our availability for drop ins/dog walks is listed below: Monday - Before 7 am and after 5 pm Tuesday - Anytime Wednesday - Before 9 am and after 8 pm Thursday - Before 8 am and after 5 pm Friday - Anytime Saturday - Anytime Sunday - Anytime We are also available for overnight housesitting any day of the week! If you are looking for a stay over a M, W, or Th, we both work those days so can only accommodate pets who are used to you being away from home. Please message us to get your pet’s staycation booked! 😻

antiPatterns: Avoid generic 3-column icon cards. Copy must be specific to this Facebook page.
photoInventory: You will receive 7 real Facebook photos: hero = storefront/work sample, gallery slots = additional post photos. Design image areas as 16:9 or 4:3 placeholders.
